subcodes.first_line: O esteemed and noble personage! From the sincerity of intention, purity of nature, and abundance of zeal that thou didst possess, and in the unity of nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص جلیل محترم از حسن نیت و پاکی طینت و وفور همت که داشتی و در اتحاد دول
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @light and darkness
